metadata.description: Furaidē's shikigami for Claude Code — skill analytics (Mekiki) and git workflow (Hanko).

plugins.name: mekiki
plugins.description: Mekiki (目利き — 'appraiser'): captures every skill invocation and judges its effectiveness offline via the mekiki analytics engine.

plugins.name: hanko
plugins.description: Hanko (判子 — 'signing seal'): spawns a Haiku subagent for git commits, pushes, PR creation, and CI monitoring with human-in-the-loop approval.
